steps.title: Spot the defining context
steps.content: ”I'm as hungry as the winter, I'm ill. I'm shaken—and where haven't I been—fate has tossed me everywhere!” Trofimov's list of hardships immediately after “undergone a great deal” reveals what that phrase means.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Experienced” captures the sense of having gone through or endured hardship—exactly what Trofimov describes with his list of suffering. The other three choices do not fit this meaning. That matches choice C — C is correct.
